_readme: Consumer Rights by Country data. country-rights-engine.js renders consumer-rights-by-country.html entirely from this file: one tab + panel per entry in 'countries'. TO ADD A COUNTRY (EU, Australia, ...): append a new object here with its own code/flag/name/subtitle/resources/guides — no HTML or JS changes. Never add an empty/placeholder country; only add one when it has real content. 'default_country' picks the tab shown when no ?country= param is present. Deep-link with consumer-rights-by-country.html?country=<code> (or any value in a country's url_aliases). All resource/guide urls are site-absolute.
